title: Explore banking options (separate from editorial comparison)
intro: When you are ready to apply, these are providers expats often compare alongside traditional banks. Explore fees and eligibility on each official site — this block is not a ranking of the table above.

items.reason: Digital Dutch account with English-first flows — confirm plan fit vs your balance and card needs.
Spending and FX companion — validate salary and direct-debit needs vs a Dutch account.
Multi-currency transfers — useful before and after local account setup.
Traditional Dutch bank when you want branch depth and a familiar retail stack.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
